arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes public apology for brutal remarks he made about Liverpool and Chelsea

arts.ttl: Gary Neville admits he REGRETS 'billion pound bottle jobs' criticism about Chelsea and reveals the two ex-Premier League players he was too harsh on
arts.sum: Gary Neville has admitted he regrets previously calling Chelsea 'billion pound bottle jobs' and apologised for further harsh criticism of two former Premier League stars.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Shamrock Rovers Conference League clash predicted with another goal-frenzy result
arts.sum: Chelsea have the chance to end the Conference League league phase with a 100% winning record when they take on Irish side Shamrock Rovers later today. Shamrock Rovers will be desperate for three points though, with a win securing the Irish side's spot in the knockout stages.

arts.sum: No one's going to pay that for him.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Shamrock Rovers – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea conclude their Europa Conference League league phase campaign against Shamrock Rovers this evening. The Blues take on Irish opposition for the first time in Europe, in what will be a huge occasion for the visitors at Stamford Bridge. arts.ttl: Arsenal in for shock move for Chelsea FLOP
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to sign Chelsea ’s Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall, according to reports. As for Sterling, reports suggest that he has no plans to cut short his loan at Arsenal and seek more regular football at another club.

arts.sum: The Europa Conference League league phase concludes tonight with Chelsea hosting Shamrock Rovers. The Blues top the league phase having collected maximum points from their five games and tonight will be the first time in history that they play an opponent from the Republic of Ireland.
